items.form_text: Your Current Nonimmigrant Status

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application
items.form_text: I am or have been a victim of a severe form of trafficking in persons.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application
items.form_text: I have cooperated with reasonable requests for assistance from law enforcement.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application
items.form_text: Due to my age or the trauma I have suffered, I am exempt from the requirement to cooperate with reasonable requests for assistance from law enforcement.

excluded_sections.name: Part 3 Instructions
excluded_sections.reason: Instructional text only; not a direct question or fillable field.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I am physically present in the United States, American Samoa, or the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or at a port of entry, on account of trafficking, or have been allowed entry into the United States to participate in investigative or judicial processes associated with an act or perpetrator of trafficking.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I fear that I will suffer extreme hardship involving unusual and severe harm upon removal.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I have reported the trafficking crime of which I am claiming to be a victim.
items.instruction: If you selected 'Yes,' indicate to which law enforcement agency and office you have made the report, the address and phone number of that office, and the case number assigned, if any. If you selected 'No,' explain the circumstances below.

details_fields.label: Law Enforcement Agency and Office
details_fields.default_value: Human Trafficking Prosecution Unit of the U.S. Department of Justice

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I was under 18 years of age at the time at least one of the acts of trafficking occurred.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I have complied with reasonable requests from Federal, State, Tribal, or local law enforcement authorities for assistance in the investigation or prosecution of acts of trafficking, or am unable to cooperate with such requests due to physical or psychological trauma.
items.instruction: If the trafficking experience occurred before the age of 15, select 'No'. If you selected 'No,' and you were over 18 years of age at the time one of the acts of trafficking occurred, explain the circumstances.

details_fields.label: Explanation
details_fields.condition: If 'No' and you were over 18 years of age at the time one of the acts of trafficking occurred

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: This is the first time I have entered the United States.
items.instruction: If you selected 'No,' list each date, place of entry, and under which status you entered the United States for the past five years, and explain the circumstances of your most recent arrival. If you need extra space, use the space provided in Part 9. Additional Information.

details_fields.label: Place of Entry - City or Town

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: My most recent entry was on account of the trafficking that forms the basis for my claim.
items.instruction: Explain the circumstances of your most recent arrival.

details_fields.label: Circumstances of Your Most Recent Arrival
details_fields.instruction: Describe how you entered, where you entered, and what happened afterward, including any detention, processing, release, or parole.

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I am requesting an Employment Authorization Document (EAD) when I am granted T nonimmigrant status.
items.where_to_verify: Pay Stubs; Tax Records; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 3. Additional Information About Your Application (continued)
items.form_text: I am now applying for one or more eligible family members.
items.instruction: If you selected 'Yes,' complete and include a Form I-914, Supplement A, Application for Derivative T Nonimmigrant Status, for each family member for whom you are now applying. You may also apply to bring eligible family members to the United States at a later date.

items.form_text: Committed a crime or offense for which you have not been arrested?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Been arrested, cited, or detained by any law enforcement officer (including Department of Homeland Security (DHS), former Immigration and Naturalization Service (INS), and military officers) for any reason?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Been charged with committing any crime or offense?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Been convicted of a crime or offense (even if violation was subsequently expunged or pardoned)?
Been placed in an alternative sentencing or a rehabilitative program (for example: diversion, deferred prosecution, withheld adjudication, deferred adjudication)?
Received a suspended sentence, been placed on probation, or been paroled?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Been in jail or prison?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Been the beneficiary of a pardon, amnesty, rehabilitation, or other act of clemency or similar action?
Exercised diplomatic immunity to avoid prosecution for a criminal offense in the United States?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: If you answered 'Yes' to any of the above questions, complete the following table.
items.instruction: If you need extra space, use the space provided in Part 9. Additional Information.

fields.label: Why were you arrested, cited, detained, or charged?
fields.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

fields.label: Date of arrest, citation, detention, charge
fields.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

fields.label: Where were you arrested, cited, detained, or charged? (City or Town, State, Country)
fields.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Engaged in prostitution or procurement of prostitution or do you intend to engage in prostitution or procurement of prostitution?
EVER engaged in any unlawful commercialized vice, including, but not limited to illegal gambling?
EVER knowingly encouraged, induced, assisted, abetted, or aided any alien to try to enter the United States illegally?
EVER illicitly trafficked in any controlled substance, or knowingly assisted, abetted, or colluded in the illicit trafficking of any controlled substance?

excluded_sections.name: Part 4 Instructions
excluded_sections.reason: Instructional text only; not a direct question or fillable field.

items.form_text: Hijacking or sabotage of any conveyance (including an aircraft, vessel, or vehicle)?

Seizing or detaining, and threatening to kill, injure, or continue to detain, another individual in order to compel a third person (including a governmental organization) to do or abstain from doing any act as an explicit or implicit condition for the release of the individual seized or detained?
Assassination?
The use of any firearm with intent to endanger, directly or indirectly, the safety of one or more individuals or to cause substantial damage to property?

The use of any biological agent; chemical agent; or nuclear weapon or device; explosive; or other weapon or dangerous device, with intent to endanger, directly or indirectly, the safety of one or more individuals or to cause substantial damage to property?
Designated as a terrorist organization under the Immigration and Nationality Act section 219?

Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: Hijacking or sabotage of any conveyance (including an aircraft, vessel, or vehicle)?

Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: Seizing or detaining, and threatening to kill, injure, or continue to detain another individual in order to compel a third person (including a governmental organization) to do or abstain from doing any act as an explicit or implicit condition for the release of the individual seized or detained?
Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: Assassination?

Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: The use of any firearm with intent to endanger, directly or indirectly, the safety of one or more individuals or to cause substantial damage to property?

Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: Soliciting money or members or otherwise providing material support to a terrorist organization?

Any other group of two or more individuals, whether organized or not, which has engaged in or has a subgroup which has engaged in: The use of any biological agent; chemical agent; or nuclear weapon or device; explosive; or other weapon or dangerous device, with intent to endanger, directly or indirectly, the safety of one or more individuals or to cause substantial damage to property?
Do you intend to engage in the United States in: Espionage?
Do you intend to engage in the United States in: Any unlawful activity, or any activity the purpose of which is in opposition to, control, or overthrow of the government of the United States?

Do you intend to engage in the United States in: Solely, principally, or incidentally in any activity related to espionage or sabotage or to violate any law involving the export of goods, technology, or sensitive information?
Have you ever been or do you continue to be a member of the Communist or other totalitarian party, except when membership was involuntary?

Have you, during the period of March 23, 1933, to May 8, 1945, in association with either the Nazi Government of Germany or any organization or government associated or allied with the Nazi Government of Germany, ever ordered, incited, assisted, or otherwise participated in the persecution of any person because of race, religion, nationality, membership in a particular social group, or political opinion?

excluded_sections.name: Part 4 Continued Intro
excluded_sections.reason: The lead-in text for items 3 and 4 is contextual only; the actual answerable fields are captured as separate yes/no questions.

items.form_text: Intentionally killed, tortured, beaten, or injured?
Displaced or moved from their residence by force, compulsion, or duress?
In any way compelled or forced to engage in any kind of sexual contact or relations?
Are removal, exclusion, rescission, or deportation proceedings pending against you?
Have removal, exclusion, rescission, or deportation proceedings EVER been initiated against you?
Have you EVER been removed, excluded, or deported from the United States?
Have you EVER been ordered to be removed, excluded, or deported from the United States?
Have you EVER been denied a visa or denied admission to the United States?
items.instruction: If a visa was denied, use the space provided in Part 9. Additional Information.

items.form_text: Have you EVER been granted voluntary departure by an immigration officer or an immigration judge and failed to depart within the allotted time?
Acts involving torture or genocide?
Killing any person?
Intentionally and severely injuring any person?
Engaging in any kind of sexual contact or relations with any person who was being forced or threatened?
Limiting or denying any person's ability to exercise religious beliefs?

Served in, been a member of, assisted in, or participated in any military unit, paramilitary unit, police unit, self-defense unit, vigilante unit, rebel group, guerrilla group, militia, or insurgent organization?
Served in any prison, jail, prison camp, detention facility, labor camp, or any other situation that involved detaining persons?
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration

items.form_text: Have you EVER been a member of, assisted in, or participated in any group, unit, or organization of any kind in which you or other persons used any type of weapon against any person or threatened to do so?

Have you EVER assisted or participated in selling or providing weapons to any person who to your knowledge used them against another person, or in transporting weapons to any person who to your knowledge used them against another person?
Have you EVER received any type of military, paramilitary, or weapons training?
Are you under a final order or civil penalty for violating section 274C (producing and/or using false documentation to unlawfully satisfy a requirement of the Immigration and Nationality Act)?
Have you EVER, by fraud or willful misrepresentation of a material fact, sought to procure, or procured, a visa or other documentation, for entry into the United States or any immigration benefit?
Have you EVER left the United States to avoid being drafted into the U.S. Armed Forces?
Have you EVER detained, retained, or withheld the custody of a child, having a lawful claim to U.S. citizenship, outside the United States from a U.S. citizen granted custody?
Do you plan to practice polygamy in the United States?
Have you entered the United States as a stowaway?

excluded_sections.name: Part 4 Continued Group Headers
excluded_sections.reason: The lead-in text for items 8, 10, and 11 is contextual only; the actual answerable fields are captured as separate yes/no questions.

items.form_text: Do you have a communicable disease of public health significance?

Do you have or have you had a physical or mental disorder and behavior (or a history of behavior that is likely to recur) associated with the disorder which has posed or may pose a threat to the property, safety, or welfare of yourself or others?
Are you now or have you been a drug abuser or drug addict?

options.label: I can read and understand English, and I have read and understand every question and instruction on this application and my answer to every question.
The interpreter named in Part 7. read to me every question and instruction on this application and my answer to every question in a language in which I am fluent, and I understood everything.
